objective.title: Relay Loop
objective.detail: Boot the west relay and expose the next lane.

interactables.label: Terminal A
interactables.hint: Boot the west relay and expose the next lane.

interactables.label: Terminal B
interactables.hint: Bridge the east choke and draw security off center.

interactables.label: Terminal C
interactables.hint: Prime the final node to arm the extraction beacon.

extraction.hint: Hold inside the beacon to upload the relay chain and leave.
